series_metadata.series_title: Ohios Best Rx (OBRx) program pharmaceutical and pharmacy contract files
series_metadata.series_description: Contracts and related contract documents between OBRx and pharmaceutical manufacturers, and OBRx and pharmacies, that contain trade secret and other confidential information as per Amended Substitute House Bill 468, 126th General Assembly and per Ohio Revised Code sections 173.71 to 173.91.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 6 years. ; Electronic: 6 years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
